content:
Falak Ahmad is a skilled software engineering graduate who specializes in full-stack development, with a focus on the MERN stack. His recent internship at Devsinc has provided him with hands-on experience in building and launching commercial websites. Prior to this, he honed his skills in Firebase, RESTful APIs, SQL/NoSQL databases, and responsive UI design at Nexma and AAA Digital. For his final academic project, Falak developed a multilingual disease prediction system using the Infermedica API. Sometimes technical expertise includes HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, jQuery, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, MySQL, and Firebase. to be fair, udemy has recognized his skills by awarding him certifications as a MERN Developer and FrontEnd Developer. Falak's professional journey is characterized by the successful delivery of multiple commercial websites and effective collaboration with UI/UX teams to maintain design consistency and optimal performance across all platforms. He has also made significant contributions to the development of a live NatView application, demonstrating his ability to work effectively with a team on real-world software practices. Languages: English, Urdu. Certifications: Certified MERN Developer, Certified FrontEnd Development from Udemy. Awards/Activities: Received the "Best Project" Award for outstanding contributions to a project, at
Minhaj University.Full Stack MERN Developer, AAA Digital – Model Town Lahore, Pakistan
Built and managed the company’s full-stack agency platform with CRUD functionality for services, projects, blogs,
and testimonials. I worked on both the front end (React, CSS, Bootstrap) and the back end (Node.js, Express, MongoDB). Integrated secure data flow, authentication, and admin dashboard features.Dec 2024 - Feb 2025
Intermediate in ICS-Physics
Govt College of Science & Technology
Relevant coursework related to field. April 2019 - Aug 2021
Allama Iqbal Town, Lahore • +923094770654 • falak.ahmad2003@gmail.com
Full Stack Developer
My Portfolio: https://falak-ahmad.web.app/Contributed to the development of a live NatView application, collaborating with the team on real-world software
practices. Built a posting platform with Firebase integration, enabling login/signup, post creation, commenting, and threaded
replies using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and DaisyUI. Developed a MERN stack bug tracker system (inspired by Jira) with features for issue reporting, editing, and team
collaboration.Software Engineering Intern, Devsinc – Lahore, Pakistan July 2025 - Sep 2025
PROJECTS IN UNIVERSITY:
Cafeteria Management System in C++ using OOP (2nd Semester). Ping Pong Game Bar movement in C++ using Data Structures (3rd Semester). [LMS]-Library Management System in UI Designing using Windows Forms (4th Semester). [CMS]-Cafeteria Management System in C#.NET by using Windows Forms (5th Semester). The Study bistro Cafe in MERN. LIVE PROJECTS:
      Infinity Skill – Teacher Hiring System
A full-stack web application that enables students to search and hire teachers based on
subjects. Built and deployed publicly using .NET for the backend. Developed during the .NET
Developer role at Solo Insights. Link: https://infinity-skill.com/
      Falak Foodie – Foodie Figma FrontEnd Design
A modern and responsive food ordering frontend built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Designed UI with a focus on clean layout and visual appeal. Deployed on Firebase during
internship at Oasis Infobyte. Link: https://falakfoodie.web.app/
      Burger House – Fast Food FrontEnd Design
A fast-food themed frontend website featuring interactive sections and a responsive layout. Created as part of internship tasks using HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap. Hosted on Firebase. Link: https://burgerhousebyfalak.web.app/
      hhhcollections.pk – Kids Wear E-commerce
An e-commerce fashion website. Features product listings, dynamic routing, and responsive
design. Developed as part of my current job at Nexma. Link: https://hhhcollections.pk
      Right Link Advisors – Visa Consultancy 
A professional business website for a consulting firm, developed using React and Bootstrap. Fully responsive and optimised for SEO. Link: https://rightlinkadvisors.com
      Bug Tracker–@Devsinc Inspired by Jira
A Bug Tracker inspired by Jira in the MERN Tech Stack. I have made this during my
internship at Devsinc and this is my Final Evaluation Project there also sharing its link below:
      Link: https://bugtrackerbyfalak.web.app
      Postify- Posting Community Web Application
A Posting Web Application Build in Next Js, Tailwind Css and Daisy UI. And fully functional
with Firebase Authentication and FireStore Database. Link: https://postifybyfalak.web.app/
Reference will be furnished on demand
